MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Floyd Butler. Soyeon Sandy Jong, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Alexander Davis. The Court having received evidence grants judgment as prayed for in the petition. See imaged document.
